_meta.note: monthly completed SC by provider per clinic (all categories). Doctors with <3 total lumped into Others/locum.
_meta.days_note: active_days = distinct days/month a provider had >=60min realized SC roster slots (capacity). productivity = done/active_days.
_meta.cat_note: SH/STI done = description-based diagnoses (full history, not encounter_tags) — SH=ED/PE/etc, STI=GUI/PEP/syphilis/herpes/etc.
